title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Elxsi Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Elxsi Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi Global Group has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Elxsi Global Group:
Tata Elxsi Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi Global Group!
